column2: Store them securely. The previous set is no longer valid and each code can be used only once.

column2: Generating a new set immediately invalidates the previous backup codes. Confirm with the latest authenticator code before rotating them.

column2: Disabling two-factor authentication removes the second verification step for future backend sign-ins. Use this only if you are rotating to another device or method.

column1: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP-compatible app. Then confirm the current 6-digit code to finish setup.
column2: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP-compatible app. Then confirm the current 6-digit code to finish setup.

column1: 为店铺登录添加身份验证器应用，之后可用基于时间的一次性码确认登录，并保留一次性备用码作为恢复方式。
column2: Add an authenticator app to your storefront login. You can then confirm sign-ins with a time-based code and keep one-time backup codes as recovery access.

column1: 这些备用码已替换之前的集合，请立即保存。每个备用码只能使用一次。
column2: These codes replaced the previous set. Save them now. Each backup code can be used only once.

column1: 您可以在店铺验证策略开启前配置身份验证器。在相关密码或谷歌验证流程在配置中启用之前，登录验证默认保持关闭。
column2: Your authenticator can be configured before the storefront challenge policy is turned on. Login enforcement stays off by default until the relevant password or Google flow is enabled in configuration.

column1: 生成新的备用码会立即使旧的备用码失效。请在轮换之前用最新的身份验证器码确认。
column2: Generating a new set immediately invalidates the old backup codes. Confirm with the latest authenticator code before rotating them.

column1: 关闭双因素认证将移除未来店铺登录的第二步验证。仅在更换设备或验证方式时使用。
column2: Disabling two-factor authentication removes the second verification step for future storefront sign-ins. Use this only if you are rotating to another device or method.

column1: 打开 Google Authenticator、Microsoft Authenticator、1Password 或其他兼容 TOTP 的应用，扫描此二维码。
column2: Open Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, 1Password, or another TOTP-compatible app and scan this code.

column1: 输入当前的6位身份验证器码，并将这些备用码保存在安全的地方。每个备用码只能使用一次。
column2: Enter the current 6-digit authenticator code and keep these backup codes somewhere safe. Each backup code works only once.
